Acceptance criterion 7 (FGAP-035 implementation context compiled via this script) validated end-to-end: compile-task-context.ts produced compiled-contexts/task-block-fgap035.md; that task-block fed into compile-implementation-context.ts which produced compiled-contexts/implementation-fgap035-rendered-context.md (472 lines); implementer agent (general-purpose) consumed the rendered context and committed f17efa3 applying all 11 cascade-target rows + e88d7ee for the 12th forbidden-phrase site.
